short_summary: Xi in Pyongyang, Cuba sanctions tightened
rationale: Xi's Pyongyang visit is now materialised and ongoing — a continuation of last cycle's uptick with no new qualitative step; Trump's Cuba sanctions are a fresh domestic policy action with modest direct impact on US residents.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit is now confirmed and ongoing; axis consolidation is an established fact from last cycle. Continuation with no new qualitative escalation for US residents this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company, blasts Castros
top_events.summary: Fresh US sanctions on Cuba's oil company signal tightening pressure; modest direct impact on US residents but reflects active foreign policy posture in the Western Hemisphere.

top_events.title: Trump to pick US attorney Jay Clayton for director of national intelligence
top_events.summary: Domestic political appointment with potential intelligence policy implications; moderate relevance to US residents as it shapes national security leadership.
